Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
4.25.3 Joining a Clan
(See also:
HELP CLANS
,
HELP
CLAN
LIST)
To
join
a clan requires that you locate a
member
of the clan that is willing
and able to invite you into
membership
. Unlike
cities
and
houses
(where the
information you need is easily available via HELP <cityname> or
HELP HOUSE
<housename>), clan information is not so easily found.
If you have the
name
of the clan, you could try
CLANHELP
<clanname>. If this
works then you can try to contact one of those listed in the clanhelp to
request membership.
A list of all
clans
is available through HELP CLANLIST.
(See also:
HELP CLANS
, HELP CLAN LIST)
Achaea is developed and published by
Iron Realms Entertainment.
